testcase.name: @AfterMethod Logout
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchSessionException: invalid session id: session deleted as the browser has closed the connection from disconnected: not connected to DevTools (Session info: testcase.name: @BeforeMethod LoginTest
